Across a full playthrough (round 1 opening-hand phase through round 13 mid-crisis with doom 9/10), the 'Choose an action' menu never offered a Resign option, despite docs_agent/scenario_reference.md stating 'Resigning is safe but forfeits unearned victory points' as an available outcome. Rules reference confirms Resign is a valid action type (not provoking Attacks of Opportunity, alongside Fight/Evade/Parley) but I could find no way to invoke it via the CLI to voluntarily end the scenario and lock in banked XP when Agenda3's doom race became mathematically unwinnable. If resign truly isn't exposed as a player option in this engine build, that's a gap between scoring documentation and actual capability.
